title: Local Gift Cards
description: What are multi-store gift card programs available for local commerce that support both consumers and businesses with tax-compliant, flexible gifting options?
narrative: The user seeks information on regional, multi-merchant gift card programs—like Saint-Affrique’s 'Coeur de Ville'—that enable flexible spending across local businesses, offer tax advantages for employers, and provide secure, reusable value with extended validity. Relevance is determined by whether the gift card supports multiple local retailers, complies with URSSAF or similar regulations for employee benefits, allows incremental spending (e.g., in €10 increments), and offers features like loss protection, online purchase, and year-round validity. Generic single-store gift cards (e.g., cooking classes) are irrelevant unless they are part of a broader local commerce initiative.

title: Dog-Friendly Vacations
description: What are the best dog-friendly accommodations and itineraries in the Val di Vara and La Spezia region of Italy?
narrative: The user is planning a trip to the Ligurian coast and needs to find accommodations and activities that welcome dogs, ensuring a stress-free vacation with their pet. Relevance is determined by listings of hotels, agriturismi, B&Bs, and resorts that explicitly allow animals, offer special pet services (A DOG), and provide dog-friendly itineraries or nearby attractions. General travel guides or pet-unfriendly options are not relevant, even if located in the same region.

title: E85 Honda Tuning
description: What are the common performance issues and tuning solutions for Honda vehicles running on E85 fuel, particularly with K20 engines and aftermarket modifications?
narrative: The user is an enthusiast who has modified a Honda vehicle (e.g., Lotus S1, Civic EP3, or FN2) with a K20 engine and is running E85 fuel. They are experiencing issues such as rough idle, inconsistent throttle response, TPS calibration errors, injector problems, and poor torque curve optimization after fuel system degradation. They seek practical, community-tested solutions—including reprogramming with KPro, replacing fuel components, recalibrating sensors, and tuning strategies—that have successfully resolved these issues in real-world scenarios. Relevance is determined by direct experience with E85 on K20-based Hondas, specific diagnostic steps, part recommendations (e.g., Brembo, Spoon, DIXCEL), and tuning outcomes (e.g., horsepower gains, smooth operation). Content unrelated to E85, K20 engines, or Honda tuning (e.g., Bali villas) is irrelevant.

title: Italian Veal Roast
description: How do you prepare an authentic Italian-style veal roast with mozzarella, sundried tomato tapenade, and fresh pasta?
narrative: The user is seeking a detailed, step-by-step recipe for an Italian-style veal roast as described in the provided document, including ingredients, preparation techniques, and serving suggestions. Relevance is determined by the presence of specific elements: veal roast preparation, use of mozzarella and sundried tomato tapenade, asparagus, fresh basil, calf stock, herbs, and accompanying fresh pasta with Parmesan. Instructions must be clear, sequential, and match the culinary style described. Content about cookies, nutrition facts, or unrelated recipes (e.g., tartiflette or gnudi) is irrelevant.

title: Car Cover Selection
description: What is the best breathable, scratch-resistant car cover for small classic and modern vehicles like the Mini or Ford Fiesta?
narrative: The user is seeking a high-quality interior car cover specifically designed for small vehicles, prioritizing breathability, dust resistance, and scratch protection. They value products with elastic bases for easy fitting, soft fabrics (like the 130 g/m² material mentioned), and proven reliability—as evidenced by awards like Auto Express Best Buy. Relevance is determined by matching product specifications (size S, blue, compatible with Mini/Fiesta/etc.), material quality, and user-tested performance, excluding unrelated automotive parts or unrelated web design services.

title: Thailand Authentic Travel
description: What are off-the-beaten-path experiences in Thailand that offer genuine cultural immersion beyond typical tourist destinations?
narrative: The user seeks authentic, non-touristy experiences in Thailand that involve meaningful interaction with local culture, natural exploration away from crowded resorts, and personal discovery—such as hiking to secluded beaches like Sabai, navigating remote villages like Mae Salong, or engaging with locals in unexpected ways (e.g., being rescued by a Belgian beer heir). Relevance is determined by content describing unscripted, immersive, and culturally rich encounters that contrast with commercialized tourism, including transportation quirks, local traditions (e.g., princesses' cave rituals), and extended stays in lesser-known areas like Pai or Railay. Content focused solely on popular attractions like Bangkok malls or Koh Tao diving without personal immersion is not relevant.

title: Carbon-Neutral Mobility
description: What integrated solutions are available for businesses and cities to transition to carbon-neutral transportation systems using renewable energy and electric vehicle infrastructure?
narrative: The user seeks information on comprehensive, scalable initiatives that combine renewable energy generation, electric vehicle charging networks, and smart mobility services to enable carbon-neutral transportation—particularly those led by organizations like ENGIE. Relevance is determined by solutions that integrate wind/solar power with EV charging fleets, involve public-private partnerships, reduce emissions across the transportation value chain, and demonstrate real-world deployment (e.g., Zeebrugge wind farm and 308 EV chargers). Solutions focused solely on car rentals or individual vehicle purchases without systemic energy integration are not relevant.

title: Iaijutsu vs Kenjutsu
description: How do Iaijutsu and Kenjutsu differ in application within the Legend of the Five Rings roleplaying game, and in what contexts is one considered superior to the other?
narrative: The user seeks to understand the functional, mechanical, and social distinctions between Iaijutsu and Kenjutsu in L5R, particularly why Iaijutsu is often perceived as superior despite both arts using the same weapon. They want to know if Iaijutsu is limited to formal duels, whether a Kenjutsu fighter can opt out of an Iai duel, and how roleplay justifies the perceived prestige of Iaijutsu specialists. Relevance hinges on clarifying the rules, cultural context, and narrative implications of each art—especially how Iaijutsu’s one-strike precision suits courtly duels while Kenjutsu excels in chaotic combat, and how clan traditions (like the Kakita) influence perception of skill.

title: Returnee Resettlement

narrative: The user is a French citizen returning from long-term expatriation and needs a comprehensive, authoritative guide to reestablishing legal, administrative, and social rights in France. Relevance is determined by documents that detail official procedures for exchanging foreign driving licenses, claiming unemployment benefits via U1/U2 forms, enrolling in French health insurance (Puma/S1), registering children for school or ASSR/ASR certifications, and filing tax or customs declarations. Information must be current, government-issued, and specific to post-expatriation reintegration—not general expatriation advice or unrelated social media opinions.

title: Subscription Termination
description: How can a consumer legally and efficiently terminate a subscription contract in France, particularly for services like mobile plans, insurance, or streaming platforms, while minimizing fees and complying with legal requirements?
narrative: The user seeks clear, step-by-step guidance on terminating various types of subscription contracts in France, including telecom (e.g., SFR, Bouygues), insurance (e.g., AXA), and digital services (e.g., Spotify, Apple Music). They need to understand their rights under French consumer law—particularly the Loi Chatel and cooling-off periods—how to draft a legally valid termination letter, what documentation is required (e.g., Rio code, registered mail), and which fees or penalties may apply depending on contract duration and cancellation timing. Relevance is determined by documents that provide actionable procedures, legal references, and service-specific instructions rather than general economic commentary or unrelated biographical details.

title: Electric Car Environmental Impact
description: Are electric vehicles truly more environmentally friendly than internal combustion engine vehicles when considering the full lifecycle emissions, energy sources, and infrastructure impacts?
narrative: The user seeks to understand whether electric cars deliver genuine environmental benefits compared to traditional vehicles, beyond marketing claims. Relevance depends on evidence covering manufacturing emissions (especially battery production), electricity generation mix (e.g., coal vs. nuclear vs. renewables), total lifecycle CO2 emissions, regional variations (e.g., France vs. global average), and indirect effects like resource extraction and battery recycling. Information that challenges the 'clean vehicle' narrative by showing pollution outsourcing, energy inefficiencies, or hidden trade-offs is highly relevant, as is data on long-term cost and sustainability compared to alternatives like public transit or cycling.

title: Potato Adoption
description: How did the potato transition from a New World curiosity to a staple crop in Europe, and what role did key figures like Antoine Parmentier play in overcoming cultural resistance?
narrative: The user seeks to understand the historical, social, and scientific factors that enabled the potato’s acceptance in Europe despite initial skepticism, superstitions, and resistance from institutions like the Faculty of Medicine. Relevance is determined by documents that detail the potato’s introduction by Spanish conquistadors, its early cultivation in monasteries and as animal feed, the role of botanists and pharmacists like Parmentier in promoting its nutritional value, his strategic public demonstrations (e.g., royal endorsement, guarded fields), and its eventual adoption as a famine remedy. Materials that mention regional adoption timelines (France, Germany, Ireland), resistance mechanisms, or agricultural advocacy are highly relevant; purely botanical or modern farming data are less so.

title: Spiritual Vigilance

narrative: The user seeks guidance on identifying and safely interacting with non-human entities—whether physical vessels or telepathic contacts—described in esoteric spiritual literature. title: Gaulish Resistance

Materials that contrast Roman propaganda with indigenous Gallic resistance, especially through the lens of gendered power dynamics, are most relevant. title: Incentives for Hiring
